meta_description: Your customer conversations live in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and more. Despacho Bonsai brings them together with AI support in one place.
meta_og_description: Your customer conversations live in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and more. Despacho Bonsai brings them together with AI support in one place.
meta_social_image_alt: Bonsai dashboard showing customer support activity across multiple channels
hero_title: Every channel. One place. Zero missed sales.
hero_subtitle: Your customer conversations and your content calendar — finally in the same room. For sellers, creators, and businesses that are done losing things between tabs.
hero_image_alt: Bonsai dashboard showing unified inbox and content calendar side by side
trust_bar_label: Connect the channels where your customers already are:
trust_bar_channels: WhatsApp · Instagram · Facebook · Email · Telegram · SMS
pain_title: If you sell through WhatsApp, you already know the feeling.
pain_point_1: Customers ask questions at 11pm and nobody replies.
pain_point_2: Messages get lost between a personal phone and the business account.
pain_point_3: The same team is juggling Instagram, WhatsApp, and email at the same time.
pain_closer: That's not an attitude problem. It's a tools problem.
features_subtitle: You have customer messages in WhatsApp, Instagram, and email. And a content calendar that lives mostly in your intentions. Both problems have a fix. And both fit in one subscription.
feature_1_benefit: Never lose a sale to an unanswered message again.
feature_1_description: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and email — all in one place. Respond faster, assign conversations to your team, and stop switching apps every time a notification comes in.
feature_2_benefit: Replies instantly, escalates when it matters.
feature_2_description: The agent handles common questions automatically — opening hours, pricing, availability, payment links. When the conversation calls for it, it hands off to a human right away. You decide what it does and how it sounds. It's your business, in your voice.
feature_3_benefit: For businesses where more than one person is replying.
feature_3_description: Assign conversations, leave internal notes, and use saved replies for the things that always repeat. Everyone sees the same context. Nobody answers the same thing twice. Customers feel like you know them.
feature_visual_3_ribbon: Your team sees the same thing
ai_section_title: 80% of your customer questions are the same ones, over and over.
ai_section_subtitle: The agent handles those. You handle the other 20%.
ai_classifier_title: It understands first. Then it replies.
ai_classifier_description: Before answering anything, the system reads the intent behind the message: is it a pricing question, a complaint, or an urgent request? Based on that, it decides whether to answer on its own or hand the conversation to your team.
ai_escalation_title: It escalates the moment it matters.
ai_escalation_description: If it detects frustration, urgency, or something outside its scope, it hands off immediately — no making the customer wait, no losing the thread. Your human agent arrives with the full context already in view.
ai_control_title: You decide exactly how far it goes.
ai_control_description: No black-box magic and no rogue decisions. The agent works inside the limits you set. If you want it to handle FAQs only and leave everything else to your team, that's exactly how it behaves.
ai_diagram_alt: A split diagram where an incoming message passes through an intent node and then branches into either an automatic reply or an immediate handoff to a human agent.
ai_diagram_handoff_note: hands off with context, no waiting
hiw_title: Set up in a breeze. Useful from minute one.
hiw_step_1_details: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email — everything lands in one place. Yes, including the channel you always forget to check.
hiw_step_2_details: Every message from every channel in one shared inbox. Assign conversations, set up saved replies, and stop relying on whoever's phone happens to be nearby.
hiw_step_3_details: Schedule weeks of posts across all your channels from one calendar. Stop posting when you remember. Start posting when it counts.
hiw_step_1_img_alt: Panel showing the list of channels available to connect: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, Telegram
hiw_step_2_img_alt: AI agent configuration screen with a field for custom business instructions
hiw_step_3_img_alt: Saved replies panel with examples like payment link, booking link, and shipping information
testimonials_title: From people who stopped winging it.
quote_1: Pasaba 4 horas al día metido en los DMs de la tienda intentando contestarle a todos. Ahora tenemos un inbox, reglas claras y cero mensajes sin respuesta.
quote_3: Gestionar las redes de 10 clientes era una pesadilla. Con la programación centralizada, ahorramos horas de trabajo semanal.
quote_5: La rapidez es clave en inmobiliaria. Ver todas las consultas de Facebook y redes en una sola pantalla nos permite cerrar tratos mucho más rápido.
quote_2: The best part is that whoever's covering WhatsApp always knows what promotions are running. No more 'let me check and get back to you.'
cta_title: Your next customer is already in your inbox. Unanswered.
cta_subtitle: Start free. No card required. Set up in minutes.
privacy_intro: Your information is yours. Here's exactly what we do with it — no fine print, no surprises.
privacy_s1_content: We collect what you share with us when creating your account: name, email address, and billing details. We also collect usage data necessary to operate and improve the service. At Despacho Bonsai, our fundamental principle is data minimization. We have designed our technological architecture so that most sensitive information is handled by leading security providers, preventing us from accessing or storing critical data such as passwords or credit card numbers. The information we process is divided into the following categories: 1. Identification and Authentication Information (via Third Parties) To ensure a secure and frictionless experience, we use third-party authentication services. Clerk: We use Clerk as our identity management provider. When you sign up or log in, Clerk handles account verification. We only receive a unique identifier and the basic information necessary to recognize your profile on our platform (such as your email), but we never have access to your passwords. Facebook Login: If you choose to use Facebook to log in, we use its authentication API (OAuth). In this case, we receive limited access to the public profile information that you explicitly authorize, solely to personalize your experience in our unified inbox. 2. Payment and Billing Information Financial security is our priority. Stripe: All payment processes are carried out through Stripe, a world-class payment processor. We do not store, process, or have access to your credit card or banking information. All sensitive payment data is handled directly by Stripe under its strict security and compliance protocols (PCI DSS). 3. Usage and Service Content Information To allow our platform to provide you with a unified inbox and social media management, we temporarily process the information you choose to integrate: Messaging and Scheduling Content: To enable our backend (based on technologies such as Chatwoot and Postiz), we process incoming messages and scheduled posts that you configure. This information is used exclusively to fulfill the main function of the service: managing your digital presence from one place. Connection Metadata: We may collect basic technical information (such as browser type, IP address, and activity logs) for security, system maintenance, and platform performance improvement purposes.
privacy_s2_content: We use your information to make the platform work, to send you important service updates, and to improve your experience. We do not sell or share your information with third parties for advertising purposes.
privacy_s2_details: You can request deletion of your account and data at any time by emailing hola@despachobonsai.com. We respond within 72 hours.
terms_intro: By using this platform you agree to these terms. We wrote them to be direct, not to cover ourselves.
terms_s1_content: You're responsible for keeping your account secure and for what happens under your access. If you detect unauthorized activity, let us know immediately at hola@despachobonsai.com.
terms_s2_content: You may use the platform to manage your business communications and content. Spam, illegal activity, malicious content, harassment, intellectual property infringement, and anything that harms other users or third-party platforms is strictly off the table. You're responsible for ensuring that all content scheduled or managed through our integrations complies with the policies of the respective social networks.
terms_s2_details: We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms. When possible, we'll notify you before taking any action.
cookies_intro: We use cookies to keep the platform working properly and to understand how to make it better. Here's exactly which ones and why.
cookies_s1_content: These keep the platform running: maintaining your session, remembering your preferences, processing basic actions. They can't be disabled — without them the service doesn't work.
cookies_s2_content: We use anonymous analytics cookies to understand which parts of the platform get used most and where we can improve. Everything is aggregated — no individual user is identified.
cookies_s2_details: You can disable analytics cookies from your browser settings at any time. It won't affect how the platform works.
en_only_msg: Your first month is free. No credit card
es_only_msg: This is only visible in Spanish!
